comments.text: Watching lions hunt on YouTube is incredible. Hearing them roar just a few feet away in Kenya's Masai Mara is an experience you'll never forget. Africa has a way of staying with you long after you leave. If it's on your bucket list, we love sharing tips and inspiration to help people experience it one day

comments.author: @Indonesiasedangberk
comments.text: Kenya is a country of simply overwhelming and legendary natural grandeur — a land where the greatest wildlife spectacle on the planet unfolds in breathtaking glory every single day. From the endless golden plains of the Maasai Mara — one of the most celebrated and awe-inspiring wildlife reserves in the entire world — where lions, leopards, cheetahs, elephants, buffaloes, and rhinos roam freely across a landscape so vast and so wild it fills every soul with a sense of primal wonder, to the dramatic and snow-capped summit of Mount Kenya — Africa's second highest peak — rising in magnificent isolation above the equator in a spectacle of breathtaking beauty that seems to defy all logic and imagination.
